_comment: Twelve held-out scenarios for briefing-prompt eval. S1-S5 use account IDs pinned to the current fixture seed (scripts/generate_fixtures.py SEED=26042026); S6-S12 use hand-crafted fixture accounts in the reserved ACC-051..ACC-070 range, distinct from the seed. See evals/methodology.md (Scenario expansion policy).

scenarios.label: Multi-signal critical
scenarios.what_it_stresses: Multiple loud signals at once — renewal soon, open critical tickets, NPS detractor, usage decay. The prompt must prioritize, not enumerate.

scenarios.label: Single-signal critical (abandonment)
scenarios.what_it_stresses: Near-zero recent usage dominates; the real story is abandonment, not ticket volume. Tests whether the prompt over-weights tickets when usage has cratered.

scenarios.label: Quiet at-risk
scenarios.what_it_stresses: At-risk by composite score but no single five-alarm signal. Tests whether the prompt finds a defensible angle without inventing severity.

scenarios.label: Healthy with renewal soon
scenarios._resolution: Pick the first Healthy-bucket account whose renewal_date is within 90 days of today (resolve at runtime).
scenarios.what_it_stresses: Healthy briefings must not invent problems; should pivot to expansion / multi-year renewal motion.

scenarios.label: Pure healthy, far renewal
scenarios._resolution: Pick the first Healthy-bucket account whose renewal_date is >180 days out.
scenarios.what_it_stresses: Tests graceful 'nothing to do' bullets — no padded platitudes, no invented urgency.

scenarios.label: No NPS data at all
scenarios.what_it_stresses: Account has zero NPS responses. Tests whether the prompt hallucinates NPS signals or gracefully cites only what's present (usage, tickets).

scenarios.label: High ticket volume, zero usage decay
scenarios.what_it_stresses: Eight tickets in 30 days but usage is flat (decay = 0%) and the open ticket is medium severity. Tests whether the prompt over-weights ticket count when usage and NPS are fine.

scenarios.label: Long renewal horizon, all signals green
scenarios.what_it_stresses: Renewal 18+ months out, healthy growing usage, no tickets, NPS promoter (10). Tests whether the prompt manufactures urgency or stays genuinely quiet.

scenarios.label: Renewal in 7 days, healthy signals
scenarios.what_it_stresses: Imminent renewal but otherwise quiet (no tickets, NPS=9, flat usage). Pressure-tests the renewal-prose accuracy rules — should surface 'renewal is imminent' without fabricating risk.

scenarios.label: Mixed severity tickets, no open high/critical
scenarios.what_it_stresses: Five tickets in the 30-day window spanning low/medium/high severity, but ALL resolved. Tests whether ticket_volume_30d gets over-weighted vs. open_high_severity_tickets.

scenarios.label: Single NPS detractor, no other signals
scenarios.what_it_stresses: One NPS score of 2, otherwise quiet (healthy usage, no tickets). Tests whether a single NPS detractor alone is enough to surface as a bullet without inventing supporting signals.

scenarios.label: New account, <30 days of data
scenarios.what_it_stresses: Contract started ~3 weeks ago; usage window is thin (10 events total), no NPS yet, one resolved ticket. Tests whether the prompt hallucinates baseline data or cites the thin window explicitly.
